case_title: ALI MAKHZANI VS. FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40(WAIVED). SERVED JUN-16-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP
DECLARATION TO CORRECT THE SPELLING OF DEFENDANT NAME FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAKHZANI, ALI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-20-2024 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALI MAKHZANI APPEARED. DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY CARLOS MENDOZA, COMMUNITY MANAGER, AND SHAWN BOWDEN, COURTESY PATROL DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MAKHZANI, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2023 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAKHZANI, ALI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CARLOS MENDOZA FILED BY DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP
DECLARATION CORRECT PLAINTIFF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAKHZANI, ALI
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM TO PROPERLY NAME DEFENDANT AND TO PROPERLY SERVE DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM AND FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-23-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALI MAKHZANI IS PRESENT. FILLMORE ASSOCIATES PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CARLOS MENDOZA. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT IS DEFECTIVE BECAUSE THE AGENT FOR SERVICE LISTED ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE'S WEBSITE WAS NOT SERVED. DEFENDANT WAS ALSO NOT CORRECTLY NAMED IN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO 1.) AMEND CLAIM TO PROPERLY NAME DEFENDANT, AND 2.) PROPERLY SERVE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU/S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-28-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ALI MAKHZANI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP, REPRESENTED BY CARLOS MENDOZA, COMMUNITY MANAGER, AND SHAWN BOWDEN, COURTESY PATROL DIRECTORIS ARE PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAKHZANI, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES LP
